Danny's Pro Paint and Body Shop

Photos of Recent Auto Body and Collision Projects

Located in Cape Coral, FL, Danny's Pro Paint and Body Shop has more than 10 years of auto body and auto painting experience to put to work for you. We work with insurance companies and handle all the paperwork so you don't have to. We offer a lifetime repair warranty. Call (786) 339-7651 to schedule a free estimate.

Danny's Pro Paint and Body Shop

Located in Cape Coral, FL, Danny's Pro Paint and Body Shop specializes in auto body and collision repair, painting, and restoration services. Lifetime repair warranty. Military discounts. 24/7 towing. Call today.
